鏟仔一到店，所有阿po的人便都看着他笑，有的叫道，「鏟仔，你臉上又添上新傷疤了！」他不回答，對櫃裏說，「賣咗拿卡，要一個韋費特沙夏。」便排出九文大錢。他們又故意的高聲嚷道，「你一定又靠印象流睇波了！」鏟仔睜大眼睛說，「你怎麼這樣憑空汚人清白……」「什麼清白？我前天親眼見你屌鳩Xhaka冇跑動。」鏟仔便漲紅了臉，額上的青筋條條綻出，爭辯道，「heat map不能算跑動……heat map！……stat呢啲野，能算跑動麼？」接連便是難懂的話，什麼「中下游球皇」，什麼「元素週期表」之類，引得衆人都鬨笑起來：阿po內外充滿了快活的空氣。

emilesmithrowe
Delighted to have signed a new long term contract with @arsenal the hard work continues..😀⚽️




Emile Smith Rowe signs new contract

Emile Smith Rowe has signed a new long-term contract with us.


The 18-year-old was part of the first-team squad that travelled to Singapore for our pre-season tour and made his mark with a superb goal against Atletico Madrid in the International Champions Cup.

He also provided an assist for Alexandre Lacazette in our 5-1 win over PSG on Saturday.

The Hale End graduate joined us at the age of 10 and made 11 appearances for our under-23s last season and was also a regular for our under-18s.

He made his first appearance for the first-team earlier this month in the pre-season friendly against Boreham Wood in Unai Emery’s first match as head coach.

Emile is an England youth international was part of the team that won the FIFA Under-17 World Cup last year in India.

Emery said: “I am pleased with Emile’s contribution so far this pre-season. He is working very hard and has lots of potential. I look forward to working with him and the other young players and helping them to develop as Arsenal players.”

【now.com體育】阿仙奴大軍周一已回到英國，在倫敦高爾尼訓練基地進行了一次訓練，球員士氣高昂，球場上充滿笑聲。

新加盟阿仙奴的烏拉圭球員盧卡斯托拉拿（Lucas Torreira），結束了俄羅斯世界盃後的長假後，終於與新隊友會合，並似乎已經適應了新環境。該名烏拉圭中場很快已經進入狀態，向新隊友展示出自己的實力。

不過球隊前鋒奧巴美揚（Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang）就被「新仔」搶風頭，展示出自己的才華，說的是他的跳舞才華，他向隊友們大騷不同舞步，哄得隊友們十分開心。

阿仙奴大軍留在倫敦訓練數天後，將飛往愛爾蘭在都柏林的英傑華球場，與由沙利領軍的車路士進行國際冠軍盃比賽。
